data.body: CHECKPOINT 3/6: Created tests/skills/test-redirect-stubs.sh with 3 test functions: test_project_setup_redirects, test_dev_onboarding_redirects, test_design_onboarding_redirects. Each test checks for redirect stub content (redirect/replaced/use/moved/deprecated keywords plus the target skill name). Tests will be RED because old SKILL.md files still have full original content.
